Set the player's default language. server -> Use the server's default language; client -> Use the client's current language.
Parameters:
 <language>

Grant a specified player permission to use certain commands.
Parameters:
 <operation> <player> [<command type list>]

Drop Cache Items.
Parameters:
 [<return dropped items to their original location>]

Postpone the next scheduled sweep time.
Parameters:
 [<Delay in seconds>]
word.aotake_sweep.cleanup_error: An error occurred while cleaning up, check the server logs for details.
word.aotake_sweep.dustbin_page_empty: §cThe dustbin feature is not enabled on the server.
format.aotake_sweep.server_config_mode: Server config has been reset to mode %s. Some settings will take effect only after restarting the server.
format.aotake_sweep.notify_help: Welcome to AotakeSweep! Use the command '%s' to view the help message.
format.aotake_sweep.server_default_langu: The default language of the server is set to %s.
format.aotake_sweep.player_default_langu: The default language of the player is set to %s.

Show sweep result message is set to: %s,

Play warning voice is set to: %s, 
use the command '%s' to modify the status.

format.aotake_sweep.sweep_interval: Server sweep interval is set to: %s milliseconds.

format.aotake_sweep.chunk_check_limit: Entity excess check threshold is set to: %s.

format.aotake_sweep.dustbin_page_limit: Dustbin page limit is set to: %s.
